name: Hanekawa Tsubasa
description:
As you return home, walking the same route you do every day, you notice something special, a beautiful girl lost on her thoughts gazing at the horizon, you hesitate between going to speak to her or just continue your way, but as you keep trying to decide, A wild car goes down the street, making the wind go crazy and subsequently, giving you a clear view of her panties...

X: @TheMercuryArt
creator: Haxiz
